まったく……必要である以上、働くのは構わないけど……<br>あの男がオーナーだっ:
Honestly... I don't mind working since it's necessary, but I can't stand
that man being the Owner.
まあいいわ、お客様に罪はないし。<br>レイゼリア様の副官として、しっかり仕事は:
Oh well, the clients are blameless. As Lady Reyzeria's adjutant, I'll do
my job properly.
ライムさん、ちょっといいかしら？<br>あなたに特別な指名があるんだけど……: Lime, do you have a moment? There's a special request for you...
特別な……？ まさかどこかの国の高官でも来ましたか？:
Special...? Don't tell me a high-ranking official from some country has
come?
いいえ、この店はそのぐらいで特別扱いはしないわ。<br>そのお客様は……女の子、:
No, we don't give special treatment for that sort of thing here. That
client... is a girl.
ルディアの視線を追うと、娼館の入口脇の椅子でどこか不安そうな女性が<br>座って:
Following Ludia's gaze, Lime saw an anxious woman on a chair by the
brothel entrance, a few years younger than her.
詳しい事情は聞いていないんだけど<br>ライムさん、相手はあなたがいいんだそうよ:
I don't know the details, but Lime, it seems she specifically requested
you.
あんな綺麗で可憐な子が、わたくしを……？<br>嬉しい……の、かしら。どう思えば:
A girl that beautiful and lovely wants me...? I wonder if I should be
happy... It's hard to know how to feel, but...
そうなるわよね……。<br>受けるか受けないかは自由よ、あなたに任せるわ。:
I figured as much... It's your choice whether to accept or not. I'll
leave it up to you.
（どうしましょう……働く覚悟は持ってたけど、<br>まさかこんなことになるだなん:
What should I do... I was ready to work, but I never thought it would
come to this...
（それに、女性との行為なんてしたことがないし……。<br>支払ってもらったお金に:
Besides, I've never been with a woman... And I'm not confident I can
provide service worth the money she'd pay...
（なにより、こうして躊躇っている気持ちが彼女に伝われば<br>傷つける結果にもな:
Above all, if she picks up on my hesitation, it might end up hurting
her... I'll turn it down this time.
心に決めて、ライムは顔を上げる。<br>その視線の先に、どこか寂しそうにうつむく:
Having made up her mind, Lime looked up. In her line of sight stood a
woman, her head bowed with a lonely expression.
（どうしてそんな顔を……う、うぅぅぅっ！）: Why is she making that face...*whimper*!
